zh.lifeSummary: 當Jens Rud於1332年出生在丹麥索洛時，他的父親Niels Jacobsen Rud32歲，母親Yliama N. Nielsen30歲。他於1348年與Ailed Grubendal在丹麥結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1403年在丹麥索洛索洛享年72歲，埋葬在丹麥索洛索洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jens Rud于1332年出生在丹麦索洛时，他的父亲Niels Jacobsen Rud32岁，母亲Yliama N. Nielsen30岁。他于1348年与Ailed Grubendal在丹麦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1403年在丹麦索洛索洛享年72岁，埋葬在丹麦索洛索洛。

nameMeanings.name: Rud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hungarian (Rúd): from rúd ‘stick’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a soldier or a nickname for a fighter.
English: variant of   Rudd  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Ruud
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Knut, Nels, Nils, Alf, Egil, Lars, Ludvig, Ottar.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads called Ru(u)d, in eastern Norway particularly, from Old Norse ruth ‘clearing’. Compare Rud , Rood , and Roode .

nameMeanings.name: Jens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jöns
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.description: The Union of Kalmar unites Denmark, Sweden and Norway.

en.lifeSummary: When Jens Rud was born in 1332, in Sorø, Denmark, his father, Niels Jacobsen Rud, was 32 and his mother, Yliama N. Nielsen, was 30. He married Ailed Grubendal in 1348, in Denmark. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1403, in Sorø, Sorø, Denmark, at the age of 72, and was buried in Sorø, Sorø, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jens Rud est né en 1332, à Sorø, Danemark, son père, Niels Jacobsen Rud, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Yliama N. Nielsen, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Ailed Grubendal en 1348, à Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1403, à Sorø, Sorø, Danemark, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Sorø, Sorø, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jens Rud 1332 in Sorø, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Niels Jacobsen Rud 32 und seine Mutter Yliama N. Nielsen 30. Er hat 1348 in Dänemark Ailed Grubendal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1403 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Sorø, Sorø, Dänemark und wurde in Sorø, Sorø, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jens Rud è nato il nel 1332 nel Sorø, Danimarca, il suo padre, Niels Jacobsen Rud, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Yliama N. Nielsen, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Ailed Grubendal nel 1348, nel Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1403, nel Sorø, Sorø, Danimarca, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Sorø, Sorø, Danimarca.

ja.,Korsor,Soro,Denmark: デンマークコルスoルサンクト ポvルズ
ja.Sorø, Vestsjalland, Denmark: デンマークベストスジaeランドソルo
ja.lifeSummary: Jens Rudが1332年にデンマークソルoで生まれた時，父Niels Jacobsen Rudは32歳，母Yliama N. Nielsenは30歳であった。1348年にデンマークでAiled Grubendalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1403年にデンマークソルoソルoで72歳で死去し，デンマークソルoソルoにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jens Rud(이)가 1332년 덴마크 소o에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Niels Jacobsen Rud(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Yliama N. Nielsen(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1348년 덴마크에서 Ailed Grubendal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1403년 덴마크 소o 소o에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 소o 소o에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jens Rud nasceu em 1332, em Sorø, Dinamarca, seu pai, Niels Jacobsen Rud, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Yliama N. Nielsen, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Ailed Grubendal em 1348, em Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1403, em Sorø, Sorø, Dinamarca, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Sorø, Sorø, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jens Rud родился в 1332 г. в местности сорo, Дания, его отцу по имени Niels Jacobsen Rud было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Yliama N. Nielsen, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Ailed Grubendal в 1348 г. в местности Дания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1403 г. в местности сорo, сорo, Дания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности сорo, сорo, Дания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jens Rud nació en 1332, en Sorø, Dinamarca, su papá, Niels Jacobsen Rud, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Yliama N. Nielsen, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Ailed Grubendal en 1348, en Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1403, en Sorø, Sorø, Dinamarca, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Sorø, Sorø, Dinamarca.
